concept: Design a platformer where gravity pulls toward whatever surface my character is currently standing on, allowing seamless transition between walls, ceilings, and floors. The world is filled with M.C. Escher-like impossible architecture that only makes sense when experienced through shifting gravitational perspectives. Certain enemies manipulate their own gravitational fields, creating complex pursuit scenarios across all surfaces. The story gradually reveals that this reality-bending environment is actually a training program designed to prepare explorers for truly alien worlds.
